title: Taylor McGee
text:

education_entries: Ph D in Educational Pschology, Georgia State University

research_interests: Her research draws on critical and strengths-based theories and methodologies to explore the impact of race-related experiences within educational environments (including those online) on Black students’ academic experiences and outcomes.
teaching_interests: Social Development, Research Methods, Assessment of Learning, Play Pediatric Health and Development
publications: Journal Article, Academic Journal U.S. Adolescents’ Critical Race Digital Literacy Skills: Demographic Variables and Learning Opportunities as Contributing Factors . Journal of Children and Media. Volume, 20.
